originalAlarm.description: Value stored to '__len_1887' is never read

sanitizedDescription: Value stored to 'len' is never read
reasoning: 95755181b82.c: Dead store of `len` — assigned at L36 (`len += sprintf(iobuf + len, ...)` inside `if (content_gzip)`) but never read afterwards (only iobuf is used at L38). Not marked ERROR — new bug. PC: !__STRICT_ANSI__ AND !__need___FILE — only stdio.h library macros, no feature config flags appear. The PC is under-constrained: (1) missing ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_GZIP=T requirement (GZIP=F causes content_gzip undeclared compile error in PRODUCT mode); (2) the feature config flags are desugared to runtime variables and don't appear in the PC. Real condition: ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_GZIP=T.
